MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: L. Fong, Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances on Wednesday, April 16, 2014:
Plaintiff RWW Properties LLC is represented by Olivia Perez.
Attorney Pamela C. Jackson for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wilma Jackson is NOT present. Pierre Jerome Rector, who has power of attorney for defendant per counsel, per counsel.
Attorney Brenden G. Sullivan appears for defendant by limited scope representation.

Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants, and counsel confer in Room 502B, for settlement discussions. This case does not settle. The trial date of April 21, 2014 remains on calendar.
